description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:openjdk-8-jdk Docker image with no additional services. Define a global before_script that runs apt-get --quiet update --yes, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads android-sdk.tgz from https://dl.google.com/android/android-sdk_r24.4.1-linux.tgz, extracts it, updates the Android SDK silently for android-20, platform-tools, build-tools-20.0.0, extra-android-m2repository and extra-google-m2repository, sets ANDROID_HOME to the extracted directory, and makes ./gradlew executable. Add a build job that runs ./gradlew assemble lint and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as artifacts. No caches, rules, or deployment targets are configured.
